description: Extract structured fields from legal contracts and agreements

contractTitle.description: Official title of the contract such as 'Service Agreement', 'Non-Disclosure Agreement', or 'Employment Contract', typically found at the top or in the preamble.

contractDate.description: Date the contract was executed or signed by all parties, found in the opening clause or signature section.

partyOne.description: Full legal name of the first party (e.g., company or individual), typically the service provider or employer, found in the introductory clause.

partyTwo.description: Full legal name of the second party (e.g., client or employee), typically the service recipient or employee, found in the introductory clause.

contractValue.description: Total monetary value or consideration of the contract in numeric form, found under 'Contract Value', 'Total Fees', or 'Consideration'. Exclude currency symbols.

startDate.description: The date the contract becomes effective or the service period begins, found under 'Effective Date', 'Commencement Date', or 'Start Date'.

endDate.description: The date the contract expires or the engagement ends, found under 'Expiry Date', 'Termination Date', or 'End Date'.

governingLaw.description: Jurisdiction or legal framework governing the contract, found in the 'Governing Law' or 'Jurisdiction' clause (e.g., 'Laws of Maharashtra, India').

paymentTerms.description: Payment schedule or conditions stated in the contract such as 'Monthly', 'Milestone-based', or 'Net 45 days', found in the 'Payment' or 'Compensation' clause.
